Box #8—Convert into a Benefit
v1.01 (c) Deutsch & Associates, Inc Published by Marketing Rebel LLC
Idea Power by David L. Deutsch
MarketingRebelClub.com/marketing-rebel-courses/idea-power/
Idea Power / Idea Power Adventures / Adventure #4—Box #8 Convert into a Benefit
*What might you do afterward to turn a problem or negative into something beneficial?
Sometimes a negative can be changed to a positive simply by making a change in the way
it’s perceived––or by finding a different group of people for whom it is a benefit. Post-it Notes
were invented when a scientist at the 3M company accidentally developed a very weak
glue—and then realized it was perfect for temporarily sticking small pieces of paper to books
and other papers. Sawmills realized they could sell sawdust—which they once had to pay to
be carted away—for insulation and other purposes.
*How might exaggerating something negative make it beneficial?
What if you exaggerated a negative? Is there a certain point where it becomes beneficial
for some group of people? Remember the story of the Post-it Notes!
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com
